summary: BTCPay Server integration fully tested. All 19 backend tests passed. Frontend verification confirms 'Pay with Bitcoin' button, CAD pricing, no Stripe references.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/premium-packages returns 200
✅ Premium packages contain 6 packages (featured_7, featured_30, featured_90, top_featured_7, top_featured_30, top_featured_90)
✅ All packages have currency: 'CAD' (not USD)
✅ All packages have correct structure (name, premium_type, duration_days, price, currency)
✅ POST /api/btcpay/create-invoice requires authentication (returns 401 without token)
✅ POST /api/btcpay/create-invoice requires escort role (admin gets 403)
✅ POST /api/btcpay/create-invoice returns 503 when BTCPay not configured (expected behavior)
✅ GET /api/btcpay/payment-status/{txn_id} requires authentication
✅ GET /api/btcpay/payment-status/{txn_id} returns 404 for unknown transaction
✅ POST /api/webhook/btcpay accepts POST requests and returns 200
✅ POST /api/webhook/btcpay handles InvoiceSettled event
✅ POST /api/webhook/btcpay handles InvoiceExpired event
✅ POST /api/webhook/btcpay handles InvoiceInvalid event
✅ POST /api/webhook/btcpay handles empty payload gracefully
✅ ZERO Stripe references in server.py
✅ ZERO Stripe references in backend/.env
✅ ZERO Stripe references in requirements.txt
✅ ZERO Stripe references in frontend JS files
✅ BTCPay env vars defined in .env (BTCPAY_SERVER_URL, BTCPAY_API_KEY, BTCPAY_STORE_ID, BTCPAY_WEBHOOK_SECRET)
✅ Frontend: EscortDashboard shows 'Pay with Bitcoin — XX.XX $CAD' button
✅ Frontend: Premium upgrade dialog shows correct pricing in CAD
✅ Frontend: PaymentSuccessPage renders correctly with txn_id param
✅ Frontend: i18n has pay_with_btc key in EN ('Pay with Bitcoin')
✅ Frontend: i18n has pay_with_btc key in FR ('Payer en Bitcoin')
✅ Frontend: i18n has pay_with_btc key in ZH ('用比特币支付')
✅ Frontend: PrivacyPolicyPage mentions BTCPay Server in Third-Party Sharing section
✅ Frontend: PrivacyPolicyPage mentions BTCPay Server in Payments section
✅ Frontend: PrivacyPolicyPage has NO Stripe references
context_for_next_testing_agent: BTCPay Server integration complete. Stripe fully removed. BTCPAY_* env vars are empty (not configured) - this is intentional as BTCPay Server is not connected in preview. create-invoice returns 503 as expected. Premium packages use CAD currency. Privacy policy page route is /privacy-policy (not /legal). Dashboard payment dialog shows 'Pay with Bitcoin — XX.XX $CAD'.
